posts.author: Domyx (Kris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to add an automation:
“Every day if timeline end date has passed and status is not done, notify the owner”

I can only see option where date is available for this.

My suggestion for Monday.com would be to add option for timeline because now I have to add an extra Date column, which I do not need on my board just for this automation. Unless there is a way around it?
